title: Dungeon Defenders

notes: This is a native Linux game. Proton not required.
title: Dungeon Defenders

notes: The other reports are faulty. This game does NOT run natively on linux because it is outdated. The linux version is community managed and only version 7.4.2 while the windows version, managed by the ACTUAL developers is 8.4. I got this game running with Native2Proton, a valve tool to run native games on proton(check it out it's AWESOME). With that it overall runs very smoothly and with little to none graphical glitches/artifacts.
title: Dungeon Defenders

notes:
This game has NO! up-to-date Native version!!! It wipes all your characters when using the native linux version as it's completely outdated!
You have to use the proton emulation!

Installation:
1) use https://github.com/Holston5/Native2Proton to install the windows version
2) Install the Native version of DD additionally, to get all your bought DLCs working, do NOT start it!
3) Have fun
